subject: URGENT: Server down in production
body: Our main API server has been unresponsive for the last 20 minutes. Customers are reporting 503 errors. We need immediate action. Please escalate to the on-call DevOps team.
label: urgent

subject: 🎉 You've won $1,000,000! Click here
body: Congratulations! You have been selected as our lucky winner. Claim your prize by clicking the link below and entering your bank details. Limited time offer!!!
label: spam

subject: Q3 Board Meeting — Agenda & Prep
body: Hi, the Q3 board meeting is scheduled for Friday 3PM. Please review the attached financials and prepare a 5-minute update on your department's OKRs. Let me know if you have conflicts.
label: important

subject: Re: Client proposal feedback
body: Thank you for sending over the proposal. We've reviewed it internally and have a few questions before we can move forward. Can we schedule a call this week to discuss pricing and timeline?
label: important

subject: Monthly newsletter — Industry updates
body: This month in tech: AI regulation advances, new open-source models released, and a roundup of funding news. Unsubscribe at any time.
label: low_priority

subject: Invoice #4821 overdue — Action required
body: This is a reminder that invoice #4821 for $12,400 was due on the 1st. Payment has not been received. Please arrange payment within 48 hours to avoid late fees.
label: important

subject: Team lunch this Friday?
body: Hey! A few of us are planning to grab lunch at the new Italian place on Friday around 12:30. Would love for you to join if you're free!
label: low_priority

subject: CRITICAL: Data breach detected
body: Our security system has flagged unusual data export activity from an internal account. Approximately 50,000 customer records may be at risk. Immediate response team assembly required.
label: urgent

subject: Your Amazon order has shipped
body: Your order #112-8847231 has been dispatched. Estimated delivery: Thursday. Track your package using the link below.
label: low_priority

subject: Performance review — Self-assessment due
body: Annual performance reviews begin next week. Please complete your self-assessment form by EOD Wednesday. This will be shared with your manager for the review discussion.
label: important

subject: Conflicting meeting: 2PM slot double-booked
body: You have two meetings scheduled at 2PM on Thursday: the investor call and the engineering sync. Both organizers are expecting you. Please advise which to prioritize or if a reschedule is possible.
label: urgent

subject: Cheap meds online — No prescription needed
body: Order prescription drugs online without a doctor visit. Fast delivery worldwide. Discreet packaging. Lowest prices guaranteed!
label: spam

subject: Follow-up: Partnership proposal
body: Hi, I wanted to follow up on the partnership proposal I sent two weeks ago. We're very excited about the potential synergies and would love to hear your thoughts. Are you available for a brief call?
label: important

subject: New hire onboarding — Sarah Chen starts Monday
body: Sarah Chen (Senior Engineer) joins the team on Monday. Please ensure she has laptop access, Slack/GitHub provisioned, and a 1:1 scheduled in her first week.
label: important

subject: Urgent: Legal review required before 5PM
body: The NDA with Vertex Corp must be reviewed and signed before 5PM today or the deal falls through. Legal has flagged two clauses on pages 4 and 9 that need your input. This is time-sensitive.
label: urgent
